# Metaphysics of Morals

*[Kant](../philosophers/kant.md) · 1797*

Kant's completed system of moral and legal philosophy, divided into a Doctrine of Right, dealing with external duties and law, and a Doctrine of Virtue, dealing with the ends that duty obliges us to pursue. It is where he develops his penal retributivism.
